inline_comments.message:
you should assemble /lib/share, I don't see it.
I think it like below.

        <fileSet>
            <directory>../share</directory>
            <outputDirectory>/lib/share</outputDirectory>
            <includes>
                <include>**/*.py</include>
                <include>**/*.json</include>
                <include>**/*.xml</include>
                <include>**/*.wsdl</include>
                <include>**/*.xsd</include>
                <include>**/*.bpel</include>
            </includes>
        </fileSet>
It is still there (you can expand the collapsed lines above), this patch is just remove the lib/newton from deployment
